---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to CrowdFundX.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What limitation does it address?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see in detail. Include:

- How it would work
- User interface considerations
- Technical implementation details
- Any potential challenges

## 🎨 Mockups/Designs
If you have mockups, wireframes, or design ideas, please include them here.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
What must be true for this feature to be considered complete?

- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## 🔗 Related Issues
List any related issues, discussions, or pull requests.

## 🏷️ Labels/Tags
Suggest labels for this issue:
- `frontend`, `backend`, `smart-contracts`
- `enhancement`, `ui/ux`, `performance`
- `high-priority`, `medium-priority`, `low-priority`

## 💬 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🚀 Implementation Priority
How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Blocks my workflow
- [ ] High - Would greatly improve my experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to help implement this feature
- [ ] No, I prefer the team to handle it

---

### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched the existing issues for similar feature requests
- [ ] I have provided enough detail for the team to understand the request
- [ ] I have considered the technical feasibility of this feature
- [ ] I have thought about the user experience implications
